contactInfo.title: Alaye Olubasọrọ
contactInfo.headsUpMessage: Botilẹjẹpe alaye yii jẹ aṣayan, fifun alaye (deede) yoo ṣe iranlọwọ lati mu awọn ibaraẹnisọrọ wa pọ si ati ki o dinku Dimegilio Ewu % rẹ ti o fun ọ ni iraye sare ati irọrun si awọn apakan ti aaye naa (gẹgẹbi pe ko ni lati ṣe ẹrí ẹrọ kaadi kirẹditi).
